narrative:
Page Manor (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,098 registered voters, with 83.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.4%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.6 percentage points.
